2606.09114.title: MAAM: Anchor-Preserving Compression and Contextual Calibration for Chinese Discriminatory Language Detection
2606.09114.paper_summary: Chinese discriminatory-language detection is challenging because harmful intent is often implicit and context-dependent. We propose MAAM (Myopia--Astigmatism Anchor Mechanism), a lightweight, model-agnostic framework inspired by functional visual blur: rather than preserving every token equally, MAAM retains discrimination-relevant semantic anchors and calibrates them with C--I--S contextual priors (Contextual Tone, Group Identity, and Stance Polarity). We also introduce ChLGBT, to our knowledge the first Chinese LGBT-focused discriminatory-language dataset, with 8,120 manually annotated samples and three ordinal labels: explicit bias, implicit bias, and emotional intensity. Across strong encoder baselines, MAAM improves all three prediction dimensions, with consistent gains in accuracy, F1, Brier score, and expected calibration error. Compared with frontier LLM baselines under zero-shot and few-shot prompting protocols, MAAM remains competitive while offering stronger compactness and stability. These results suggest that interpretable anchor preservation and contextual calibration provide a practical alternative to heavier model scaling for Chinese discriminatory-language assessment.
2606.09114.paper_summary_zh: 中文歧視語言檢測具有挑戰性，因為有害意圖通常是隱含的且依賴於上下文。<lb/>我們提出MAAM（近視--散光錨機制），這是一個輕量級、模型無關的框架，靈感來自功能性視覺模糊：MAAM不會平等地保留每個標記，而是保留與歧視相關的語義錨點，並用C--I--S上下文先驗（上下文語調、群體身份和立場極性）對其進行校準。<lb/>我們還介紹了ChLGBT，據我們所知，這是第一個以中國LGBT為重點的歧視語言數據集，包含8,120個手動標註的樣本和三個序數標籤：明確偏見、隱含偏見和情感強度。<lb/>在強大的編碼器基線下，MAAM改善了所有三個預測維度，並在準確性、F1、Brier分數和期望校準誤差上取得了一致的增益。<lb/>與前沿的LLM基線在零樣本和少樣本提示協議下相比，MAAM仍然具有競爭力，同時提供更強的緊湊性和穩定性。<lb/>這些結果表明，可解釋的錨點保留和上下文校準為中國歧視語言評估提供了一種實用的替代方案，而不是依賴更重的模型擴展。
2606.09114.author: Yuxin Fu et.al.
